summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ClickFlow v3.0 Linear-style task manager. All major features working including auth, project management, Sprint Board with Kanban, QA bug tracking with lifecycle, cross-project views, detail panel with inline editing, comments, notifications, and drag-and-drop functionality.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Task creation with auto-generated keys (e.g., FTP-4)
Drag and drop between Kanban columns
Task detail panel with inline editing
Bug creation and QA lifecycle management (open→in_progress→ready_for_qa→verified→closed)
Comments system with entity_id and entity_type
Sidebar navigation between Dashboard, My Tasks, All Bugs, Projects
Status and priority changes in detail panel
All backend CRUD operations (30/30 API tests passed)
